setup.title: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication
setup.scanQR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
setup.manualEntry: Or enter this secret key manually:
setup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.
setup.backupDescription: These codes can be used to access your account if you lose your authenticator device. Each code can only be used once.
setup.backupWarning: Save these codes in a secure location. You won't be able to see them again after leaving this page.
setup.confirmSaved: I have saved my backup codes in a safe place

inviteCode.label: Invite Code (optional)
inviteCode.hint: If you have an invite code, enter it to join an organization upon registration.

emailVerification.checkInbox: A verification email has been sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox.

google.noPassword: This account uses Google sign-in. Please use the Google button.
